configurations.name: mimic-teleop
runtimeArgs: import mimic.envs.tasks; from mimic.envs.registry import make; from mimic.config.models import TeleopConfig; from mimic.teleop.loop import TeleopLoop; env = make('pick-place'); env.reset(); loop = TeleopLoop(env, TeleopConfig(port=8765)); loop.run(open_browser=False)
